name: Addition is Commutative
guide_hints: This proof requires double induction! Start by proving x + 0 = 0 + x (the outer base case).
Use the theorem from Level 5 (add_id_left) which states ∀x (0 + x = x).
After the outer base case, create the outer inductive step: ∀y x + y = y + x ⇒ x + S y = S y + x and prove it using a mission.
Inside that mission, you'll need another mission to prove S(n + x) = S n + x by induction on x.
Finally, combine the outer base case and inductive step with the induction axiom!
